title: Umami as Depth-1 Synergistic Taste

analysis.object: T600: Umami as Depth-1 Synergistic Taste depth analysis

basic_tastes_eml0.description: Sweet, sour, salty, bitter: simple receptor activations; EML-0
basic_tastes_eml0.reason: Basic tastes are EML-0: discrete receptor binding, simple threshold response

umami_eml1.description: Umami: synergistic amplification of other flavors; EML-1 exponential enhancement
umami_eml1.reason: Umami is EML-1: glutamate+nucleotide synergy creates exponential flavor amplification

hardest_to_describe.description: Umami discovered last; hardest to describe; only taste above EML-0
hardest_to_describe.reason: Umami uniqueness: EML-1 makes it indescribable in EML-0 terms; requires tasting to understand

analysis.theorem: T600: Umami as Depth-1 Synergistic Taste (S879).

key_theorem: T600: Umami as Depth-1 Synergistic Taste (S879).
